calendar.matters:
Petition For Recovery Of Funds On Deposit In County Treasury.
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Boessencker for Blanche Lewis.

Mr. Boessenecker argued that his Client's birth certificate reflects her name as Blanche Gooden with a birth date of May 29, 1921 born in Texas, that her drivers license is in the name of Blanche Gooden Lewis with the same date of birth, referred to a picture of the Decedent taken in the 1940's and a genealogical chart, and stated that who his Client married was immaterial. The Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Recovery Of Funds On Deposit In County Treasury.
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Continued To May-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Recovery Of Funds On Deposit In County Treasury.
Off Calendar Apr-13-2010 Continued To May-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
